description:
Undocumented internal JSON API powering metacritic.com (a Fandom property).
Reverse-engineered from the site's public web client. Every request carries a
shared public `apiKey` that the site embeds in its own JavaScript bundle, so no
user credentials are required for read access.

One backend (`backend.metacritic.com`) serves every media type. The `mcoTypeId`
query parameter selects the medium on the browse endpoint: 1 = TV shows,
2 = movies, 13 = games. The `{mediaType}` path segment (`games`, `movies`,
`shows`) selects the medium on the title-detail, filters, and review endpoints.

The non-obvious insight: Metacritic is not just a review aggregator, it is a
cross-media taste graph. Every gap between a title's Metascore (critics) and
user score is a signal about critic-audience divergence.

Scope: this spec covers games, movies, and TV shows plus search, filters, title
detail, and critic/user reviews. Music (albums) is served through a separate
query shape and is intentionally left as a follow-up.

tools.name: composer_get-title
tools.description: Returns the full composed detail payload for a title, including Metascore, user score, summary, release data, and platform/genre metadata. Required: mediaType (default: games), slug, apiKey.

params.name: slug
params.description: URL slug of the title (e.g. the-legend-of-zelda-ocarina-of-time-1998)

params.name: apiKey
params.description: Shared public web key embedded in the metacritic.

tools.name: finder_browse-titles
tools.description: Paginated, sortable list of titles for one medium. `mcoTypeId` selects the medium (1 = TV shows, 2 = movies, 13 = games). Powers the /browse/ pages. Required: apiKey, mcoTypeId (default: 13). Optional: offset (default: 0), limit (default: 24), sortBy (default: -metaScore) (plus 4 more). Returns the TitleListResponse.

params.name: apiKey
params.description: Shared public web key embedded in the metacritic.

params.name: mcoTypeId
params.description: Media type: 1 = TV shows, 2 = movies, 13 = games

params.name: sortBy
params.description: Sort field; prefix with '-' for descending (e.g. -metaScore)

params.name: componentName
params.description: Fixed component identifier required by the backend

params.name: componentType
params.description: Fixed component type required by the backend

tools.name: finder_list-filters
tools.description: Returns the filter facets (genres, platforms, streaming networks, product types) valid for the given medium. Required: mediaType (default: games), apiKey. Optional: componentName (default: finder-filters), componentType (default: FilterList).

params.name: apiKey
params.description: Shared public web key embedded in the metacritic.

tools.name: finder_search-titles
tools.description: Full-text search spanning games, movies, TV, and people. Required: query, apiKey. Optional: offset (default: 0), limit (default: 24), componentName (default: search) (plus 1 more). Returns the TitleListResponse.

params.name: apiKey
params.description: Shared public web key embedded in the metacritic.

tools.name: reviews_list-critic
tools.description: List critic reviews for a title. Required: mediaType (default: games), slug, apiKey. Optional: offset (default: 0), limit (default: 50), componentName (default: critic-reviews) (plus 1 more). Returns the ReviewListResponse.

params.name: slug
params.description: URL slug of the title (e.g. the-legend-of-zelda-ocarina-of-time-1998)

params.name: apiKey
params.description: Shared public web key embedded in the metacritic.

tools.name: reviews_list-user
tools.description: List user reviews for a title. Required: mediaType (default: games), slug, apiKey. Optional: offset (default: 0), limit (default: 50), componentName (default: user-reviews) (plus 1 more). Returns the ReviewListResponse.

params.name: slug
params.description: URL slug of the title (e.g. the-legend-of-zelda-ocarina-of-time-1998)

params.name: apiKey
params.description: Shared public web key embedded in the metacritic.
